name: Beachside Memento
descriptionTemplate: Choose an Awakener; create 1 of their basic Strike Commands. It has {Exhaust}. Every {ordinal:3rd} time this is unleashed, instead create 1 {Fleeting Beauty} and gain +[Arg1]% Temp. Crit. Rate.
lore: Every party has its end, but the memories etched in the soul never cease. No matter how many times, when recalling this frozen moment, longing will surge like a tide.
